## Summary

Describe the user-visible outcome and link the issue or specification.

## Scope and evidence

- [ ] I changed canonical source files, not generated mirrors.
- [ ] I documented assumptions, risks, and any compatibility or migration impact.
- [ ] I added or updated focused positive and negative validation where relevant.
- [ ] I checked links, commands, and examples affected by this change.

## Validation

List the exact commands run and their results. If a check was not run, explain
why and identify the remaining risk.

## Safety and review

- [ ] No secrets, private data, local paths, generated artifacts, or unrelated files are included.
- [ ] AI-generated changes were reviewed by a human and checked against the specification.
- [ ] Security, permissions, and prompt-injection implications were considered.
- [ ] Documentation and release notes are updated when public behaviour changes.

## Reviewer notes

Call out decisions, known limitations, follow-up work, or areas needing extra
review (for example skills, workflows, security, or compatibility).
